_doc: A second affected job (ClaimIntake, ClaimsOps folder — a DIFFERENT process in a DIFFERENT folder). Its Info is a different infrastructure error (could not obtain the user token from Orchestrator) in the same window. Two unrelated automations failing with Orchestrator-side infra errors minutes apart corroborates a platform incident rather than an automation defect.

Data.Info: Could not obtain the user token from Orchestrator.
